sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka nunna ka lungngai a lung gim lua cih na'ng thei lo,
Mite en leng maizumna thu khat geel leng lam-et bei;
Kei bang lel ka nuntakna bang hi lel hiam ka cih lai,
Ka mai ah sing khuampi khat ke'n mu theiing.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua hi ka lungdamna, tua hi ka suahtakna,
Tua hika kipahna, tua hi ka lam-etna;
Tua hi kei hong siam pa, tua hi ka vang neihna,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Leitung ka nunna khempeuh a vekpi'n ka pia khia zo,
ka sung pan aw gingkhia teng phatna la bek a hi zong;
Phat dingin kilawm pen sa'ng pahtawi dingin zong hoih pen,
Hong itna lian ke'n bang tawh ka thuk zo diam?

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Tu-in kha muanna nei ta'ng, ka geelna te guak suak lo,
Sepnate Topa thupha silh leh ten ding zong hong sik;
Kakha tha zong hong dim zel Bangbang piang zong lau nawn keng,
Topa deihna bang piang cih ka tel nung sang.
